name: hostname_set
description: Get or set the system hostname
command: if [ '{{action}}' = 'get' ]; then echo "Hostname: $(hostname)" && echo "FQDN: $(hostname -f 2>/dev/null)" && echo "IP: $(hostname -I)"; else sudo hostnamectl set-hostname '{{new_hostname}}' && echo "Hostname changed to: {{new_hostname}}" && echo 'Reboot for full effect'; fi

new_hostname.description: New hostname (for set). Use 'none' for get.
